title: JRN Estimation & Multiplicative Compounding on rel-stack (Phase 1 + Phase 3)
summary: Demo notebook for Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation on the rel-stack dataset. Demonstrates three components: (1) Phase 1 — individual JRN estimation for 11 FK joins × 3 entity tasks using lightweight MLP probes (hidden_dim=32, 2 layers, 10 epochs, 3 seeds), measuring how aggregated child-table features improve downstream prediction (AUROC/neg-MAE); (2) Phase 3 — multiplicative compounding validation on 14 multi-hop join chains (2- and 3-hop), confirming JRN_chain ≈ ∏ JRN_individual with R²=0.83; (3) a fan-out heuristic baseline. The mini data JSON contains pre-computed JRN matrices, chain compounding results, and domain validation checks for 16 (join, task) pairs.
